failure.symptom: Requires Zesty.io backend API. Bug confirmed via source code: PropertyName component uses 'fa fa-pencil' (FontAwesome 4) instead of 'fas fa-pencil-alt' (FontAwesome 5), causing edit icon not to display. Also cursor should be 'text' not 'pointer', and missing title attribute for accessibility.
failure.recommendation: 跳过，需 Zesty.io 后端。Bug：FA4→FA5 图标类名 + cursor 样式
